markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Scope out a potential partnership between Plus AI and GrowthX for SEO and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Plus AI seeks help with programmatic page generation, keyword research, and content strategy for their presentation template pages](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [GrowthX can assist with workflow creation, content generation, and SEO strategy, but may have limited capacity for custom design/engineering work](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Both parties agreed to explore a hybrid approach: programmatic template pages + editorial content refresh/creation](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [Next steps include GrowthX providing a detailed proposal on scope and responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)

## Topics

### Plus AI's Current Setup and Needs

  - [Using Webflow CMS for template pages, but may need a more scalable solution for thousands of pages](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [API available for generating presentations (.pptx files)](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Seeking help with keyword research, content generation, and SEO optimization for template pages](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Open to editorial content ideas, though feeling they've covered low-hanging fruit](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)

### GrowthX's Capabilities and Constraints

  - [Confident in building high-quality workflows for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Experienced in creating programmatic pages with SEO-optimized content](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Limited capacity for custom design/engineering work due to other client commitments](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Suggested focusing on strategy, workflow building, and content quality review](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)

### SEO Strategy Discussion

  - [Importance of creating category/listing pages (e.g., "construction website templates")](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [Need for multiple indexable pages per category/filter](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
  - [Potential for 5-50 presentations per category](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [Discussed refreshing and updating existing content regularly](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)

### Proposed Hybrid Approach

  - [Focus on programmatic template page generation](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [Include editorial content refresh and creation](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [Start with launching 20 new templates and refreshing existing pages](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Leverage Plus AI's presentation library for content examples](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)

### Technical Integration

  - [Plus AI can provide API access for presentation generation](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [GrowthX to create workflows for content generation and SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Discussed embedding options (PowerPoint, Google Slides) and potential SEO implications](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide a detailed proposal outlining scope and responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [Clarify what Plus AI needs to handle vs. what GrowthX will manage](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [Schedule a project kickoff meeting](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [Explore potential for additional tools/features (e.g., file converters) to expand content offerings](https://fathom.video/share/9ii9pP8Lo2ZjvrxKfnQMYhXxHSsxfk1p?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
